summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented. REQ-42 token balance checks and error messages are removed from RegisterIP.tsx. REQ-43 token balance validation is removed from the backend registerIP function. REQ-44 file upload is made optional in RegisterIP.tsx. The migration.mo file is an added hallucinated feature not requested in the build spec.

hallucinated_features.description: A new backend/migration.mo module was added to handle state migration, mapping old actor state (with ledger, treasury, totalBurnedTokens, REGISTRATION_BURN_AMOUNT, MINIMUM_BALANCE_TO_REGISTER, INITIAL_SUPPLY fields) to new actor state without those fields.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module or handling persistent state migration. The non-goals explicitly state 'Persistent IP storage changes (not included in this scoped build)'.
